items.title: EU watchdog attacks Britain over iPhone ‘backdoor’ demand
items.description: A European tech watchdog has attacked the Government for demanding “backdoor” access to consumers’ iPhone data, piling pressure on Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood in a fight with Apple.

items.title: Apple's Still Got It: Why iPhone 17 Signals A Comeback (Upgrade)
items.description: Discover why Apple Inc.'s iPhone 17 launch and AI innovation boost stock appeal. Click for my updated look at AAPL stock ahead of its fiscal Q4 earnings.

items.title: Nvidia Stock At Key Level As Magnificent Seven Earnings Loom
items.description: Nvidia stock slipped but held a key level on Tuesday as Big Tech earnings are set to roll in.  The broader AI trade recently received a lift after Nvidia Chief Executive Jensen Huang said demand is "really, really high" for Nvidia's Blackwell graphics processing units.  Is Nvidia stock a buy or sell now?
